tasks.label: Setup dev environment
tasks.detail: Create env files, install pnpm + uv deps, build the toolkit

tasks.label: Dev: agent
tasks.command: uv run --project packages/agent --extra server fastapi dev packages/agent/src/udiagent/server/app.py --port 8007

tasks.label: Dev: chat + agent
tasks.detail: Start the core dev stack (chat SPA + agent server) together

tasks.label: Data: Start StarRocks
tasks.detail: docker compose up the local StarRocks container (idempotent; ~30-60s to become healthy)

tasks.label: Data: Generate pcx datapackage
tasks.detail: Regenerate sample-data/pcx/datapackage.json from the CSVs (stdlib only). For another dataset, run scripts/gen_datapackage.py directly.

tasks.label: Data: Seed StarRocks (pcx)
tasks.detail: Load sample-data/pcx into StarRocks and write packages/agent/starrocks-backends.json (waits for the container to be ready)
tasks.command: uv run --project packages/agent --extra starrocks python packages/agent/scripts/seed_starrocks.py

tasks.label: Data: Regenerate + seed pcx
tasks.detail: Start StarRocks, regenerate the pcx datapackage, then seed the database — one-click refresh after editing sample-data/pcx
